header: 15 presets = a redesign without a budget
subheadline: Desiderio treats the look of your site as data editors can change, not code developers must redeploy. The next rebrand is a dropdown away.

items.title: 15 shadcn presets
items.description: Five presets from ui.shadcn.com/create plus ten house presets, from Aurora to Citrus — each with WCAG 2.2-checked contrast.

items.title: Per-page overrides
items.description: Every campaign gets its own look: set a preset once in page properties and the whole subtree inherits it down the rootline.

items.title: Runtime switching
items.description: Change the preset and the whole site repaints from OKLCH tokens — no Tailwind rebuild, no deployment, no waiting.
